**Summary of Findings:**

The ColourfulText component page is accessible at `localhost:3000/components/text-animations/colorful-text`. The page loads successfully with a preview area showing the component rendering the text "The best components you will ever find".

**Bug Found**: The ColourfulText component is **NOT rendering any colorful/multi-color text effects**. The text appears in plain **white/off-white color** with no color variation. This is a functional/visual rendering bug in the ColourfulText component.
